---
title: "Decision Log"
subtitle: "[Project Title]"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
---

# Decision Log

This document records all major research decisions for audit trail purposes.

```{r}
#| include: false
library(yaml)
decisions <- yaml::read_yaml("project-tracking/decisions.yaml")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
if(length(decisions$decisions) > 0) {
  decisions_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(decisions$decisions, function(d) {
    data.frame(
      ID = d$id,
      Date = d$date,
      Decision = d$decision,
      Rationale = d$rationale,
      Made_By = d$made_by,
      Context = d$context %||% ""
    )
  }))
  knitr::kable(decisions_df, 
               col.names = c("ID", "Date", "Decision", "Rationale", "Made By", "Context"))
} else {
  cat("No decisions recorded yet.")
}
```

---

*Decision log maintained with AI assistance. All decisions and rationales provided by the research team.*
